title: ds-viz-sankey - option matrix (light)
description: Light-theme companion. Test bench for splunk.sankey. Verifies all options from the 10.4 PDF: backgroundColor, colorMode (categorical|dynamic), linkOpacity, linkValues, linkColors, resultLimit, seriesColors. Also tests three required fields (source, target, value) and the optional fourth dynamic-coloring field (value2).

ds_energy.name: canonical PDF example - energy flow with source target value value2

ds_funnel.name: ecommerce funnel - landing -> product -> cart -> checkout -> purchase

options.query: | makeresults count=5 | streamstats count AS rn | eval source = case(rn==1,"Landing", rn==2,"Product", rn==3,"Cart", rn==4,"Checkout", rn==5,"Login") | eval target = case(rn==1,"Product", rn==2,"Cart", rn==3,"Checkout", rn==4,"Purchase", rn==5,"Cart") | eval value = case(rn==1,1000, rn==2,420, rn==3,260, rn==4,180, rn==5,90) | table source target value

ds_workflow.name: support workflow - intake -> triage -> queue -> resolution

options.query: | makeresults count=8 | streamstats count AS rn | eval source = case(rn==1,"Intake", rn==2,"Intake", rn==3,"Triage", rn==4,"Triage", rn==5,"Queue-A", rn==6,"Queue-A", rn==7,"Queue-B", rn==8,"Queue-B") | eval target = case(rn==1,"Triage", rn==2,"Auto-Resolve", rn==3,"Queue-A", rn==4,"Queue-B", rn==5,"Resolved", rn==6,"Escalated", rn==7,"Resolved", rn==8,"Escalated") | eval value = case(rn==1,500, rn==2,150, rn==3,300, rn==4,200, rn==5,260, rn==6,40, rn==7,170, rn==8,30) | table source target value

ds_dynamic.name: flow with severity - source target value severity (for dynamic coloring)

options.query: | makeresults count=6 | streamstats count AS rn | eval source = case(rn==1,"DC1", rn==2,"DC1", rn==3,"DC2", rn==4,"DC2", rn==5,"DC3", rn==6,"DC3") | eval target = case(rn==1,"App-A", rn==2,"App-B", rn==3,"App-A", rn==4,"App-C", rn==5,"App-B", rn==6,"App-C") | eval value = case(rn==1,200, rn==2,80, rn==3,140, rn==4,60, rn==5,90, rn==6,50) | eval severity = case(rn==1,1, rn==2,3, rn==3,2, rn==4,5, rn==5,1, rn==6,4) | table source target value severity

options.markdown:
# `splunk.sankey` - option matrix (light)

Sankey diagrams show **proportional flow between node entities**. The width of each link is proportional to the value field. Best for funnels, energy/material flows, workflow routing, attribution, and budget breakdowns.

Full options list from the **10.4 PDF**:
- `backgroundColor`
- `colorMode` (`categorical` | `dynamic`)
- `linkOpacity` (default `0.5`)
- `linkValues` - DOS for the link width field
- `linkColors` - DOS for per-link coloring (used with `colorMode: dynamic`)
- `resultLimit` (default `1000`)
- `seriesColors`

**Required fields**: `source`, `target`, `value`. Optional 4th field for dynamic coloring.

viz_default.title: 1. Default - canonical energy example
viz_default.description: PDF canonical: Oil/Gas/Coal -> Fossil Fuels -> Energy + Electricity. Default colorMode=categorical, linkOpacity=0.5.

viz_funnel.title: 2. Ecommerce funnel
viz_funnel.description: Landing -> Product -> Cart -> Checkout -> Purchase. Drop-offs are visually obvious from link widths.

viz_workflow.title: 3. Support routing
viz_workflow.description: Multi-stage workflow: Intake branches to Triage / Auto-Resolve, etc.

viz_low_opacity.title: 4. linkOpacity=0.2
viz_low_opacity.description: Editorial - de-emphasizes flow weight, lets node labels breathe.

viz_high_opacity.title: 5. linkOpacity=0.9
viz_high_opacity.description: Maximum saturation - flow becomes the visual headline.

viz_custom_palette.title: 6. Custom seriesColors
viz_custom_palette.description: Brand palette override. seriesColors assigns one color per source node.

viz_dynamic_color.title: 7. colorMode=dynamic by severity field
viz_dynamic_color.description: Links are colored by the severity field via DOS rangeValue. Higher severity -> hotter color.

viz_tinted_background.title: 8. Custom backgroundColor
viz_tinted_background.description: Editorial panel tint - night-mode-on-night-mode for SOC walls.

viz_result_limit_high.title: 9. resultLimit=2000
viz_result_limit_high.description: Defaults to 1000 rows. Raise when you have very wide flows. Lower for performance.

viz_result_limit_low.title: 10. resultLimit=4 (truncated)
viz_result_limit_low.description: Demonstrates truncation behavior - only first N rows render. Workflow data is intentionally cut off.

viz_link_values_explicit.title: 11. Explicit linkValues binding
viz_link_values_explicit.description: Uses linkValues DOS to pick value2 instead of value, demonstrating field selection from a multi-numeric data source.

viz_alert_palette.title: 12. Alert / SOC palette
viz_alert_palette.description: Severity-coded series colors for security flow visualizations.
